A_yeast.reproduce: python3 repro/reproduce_yeast.py (recomputes VIF from raw STRING v12)

B_github.verdict: QUADRATIC DISCONFIRMED (linear AUC ~0.73, quad CV AUC ~0.59, VIF 1.003)

C_knowledge.effect: WEAK (AUC 0.58-0.62; newest-first time confound) — honest scope

meta_verdict: linear E=U*D adequate across all four channel-intact cohorts; quadratic adds nothing; swarm inherits the law
negatives_register: GitHub quadratic 'AUC 0.41 below chance' was a numerical artifact of a non-converging fit; corrected to CV ~0.59 (over-strong 'anti-predictive' wording retracted). The no-quadratic conclusion stands.
D_gap curvature statistic fell INSIDE the 1000-permutation null envelope (seed 42) => reported INCONCLUSIVE, not as evidence either way.
Kubernetes D_gap sensor null (p=0.735) reported as a null.
Clinical / contract / legislative channels: collapsed VIF or empty failing region => reported UNTESTABLE, not spun as support.
Validation Stage 1 (evasive coercion): fast-mode NULL (recall 0.25, Brier 0.30) => deep NPU claim remains load-bearing/unproven.
Validation Stage 2: blunt-manipulation recall 0.375 (credential-bypass tail) reported honestly; safety false-block 0.000.
Knowledge cohort effect is WEAK (AUC ~0.58) with a newest-first time confound; the linear-vs-quadratic verdict is what is claimed, not a strong predictor.
